title: ericoila linearis
intro: Ericoila linearis, also known as the "Rough Horsemint", is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as colds, coughs, and bronchitis due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ericoila linearis include its ability to soothe sore throats, alleviate congestion, and ease digestive issues. Herbal preparations of Ericoila linearis can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in conjunction with other herbs to promote overall well-being.
